description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage and a job named pages. In the pages job, run the shell commands: cat "top.html" > "index.html", cat "status.html" >> "index.html", cat "bot.html" >> "index.html", mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. Publish the public/ directory as an artifact and configure the job to run only on the master branch. Use the default Docker image provided by the GitLab Runner.
